nodes.label: AI as creative catalyst for brainstorming

nodes.label: AI for minor non-creative tasks

nodes.label: AI as tool to overcome creative blocks
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of creative dependency

nodes.grounding_span: it's really important to me to stay in control of the creative decisions

nodes.label: AI authenticity markers
nodes.grounding_span: I know the difference between an AI story and a human's work they've poured their heart into almost immediately

nodes.label: Creative authenticity

nodes.label: Human authorship and recognition
nodes.grounding_span: the audience at least that wants something from real live authors

nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to brainstorm, which then got my creative juices flowing

nodes.label: Negative view of AI replacing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I do fear that AI could take over writing

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI's future role
